description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a predominantly white exterior and large, rectangular windows that span much of the facade. The structure features a flat roof and a boxy, geometric design, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The front side showcases expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, providing ample natural light to the interior living spaces. The rear and side elevations have smaller windows and a few visible entry points, including a main door and a garage area. The interior layout is open, with visible rooms furnished with contemporary pieces, such as a red sofa and shelving units. The house is set up to accommodate urban living, with a small outdoor area and utility bins visible near the garage.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a minimalist white exterior. The design emphasizes open interiors and abundant natural light.
description_view_0: Front view with large, floor-to-ceiling windows and a glimpse of the interior living spaces.
description_view_1: Side view showing smaller windows, the garage area, and utility bins near the base.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, two circular vents, and a red sofa visible inside.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the window arrangement and open-plan interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flush door, no porch, and direct access from the exterior
